no_changes_rationale:
All acceptance criteria are already satisfied by existing code. No changes needed.

AC1: cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go:1495 uses `git commit --no-verify --only -m <msg> -- .ddx/beads.jsonl` — path-scoped. VERIFIED.
AC2: cli/internal/git/autocommit.go:76-82 appends `--only -- <basename>` when IncludeStaged is false. VERIFIED.
AC3: TestTrackerCommit_OnlyCommitsTrackerPath exists at tracker_lock_test.go:111 and PASSES.
AC4: TestAutoCommit_TargetOnlyPreservesUnrelatedStagedChanges exists at autocommit_test.go:39 and PASSES.
AC5-6: Full package test suites green.
AC7: lefthook run pre-commit passes.

verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/git/... -run "TestTrackerCommit_OnlyCommitsTrackerPath|TestAutoCommit_TargetOnlyPreservesUnrelatedStagedChanges" -count=1
